title: Youlife Group forms cruise talent joint venture with Sealand Maritime
content:
* Youlife Group (YOUL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/YOUL]) on Friday said that it has entered into a joint venture with Sealand Maritime Service, to develop a talent training and placement platform for the global cruise and cultural tourism industries.
 	* The two companies have established Xiamen Youlife Sealand International Cultural Tourism Development Co, which will focus on vocational training, certification and international job placement for cruise service professionals. 
 	* The partnership comes as international cruise operations in China have resumed and demand for trained cruise staff has increased.
 	* YOUL is -0.0% to $1.4.
 	* Source: Press Release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20359247-youlife-group-inc-announces-a-strategic-partnership-with-sealand-maritime-service-co-ltd-to]

title: Youlife H1 Net Profit Rises
content:
(RTTNews) - Youlife Group (YOUL) reported first half net profit of RMB 37.7 million, compared to RMB 1.0 million, prior year. Operating income was RMB 45.8 million, up 93.3%. First half total revenues were RMB 913.3 million, an increase of 16.2% from RMB 786.1 million, prior year, driven by 24.1% growth in employee management services. Lidong Zhu, CFO of Youlife, said: "Looking ahead, we will fastly execute the acquisitions and integrations in the fields of blue-collar talent vocational training and recruitment, and streamline and enhance our corresponding service lines and profit matrix." For more earnings news, earnings calendar, and earnings for stocks, visit rttnews.com.

The views and opinions expressed herein are the views and opinions of the author and do not necessarily reflect those of Nasdaq, Inc.

title: Youlife Group registers up to 14.1M shares and 545K warrants for resale
content:
* Youlife Group (NASDAQ:YOUL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/YOUL]) has filed a prospectus to register up to 7.62M Class A ordinary shares, issuable upon warrant exercise.
 	* Warrants were issued on July 9, 2025, as part of a transaction with Distoken Acquisition Corporation, including public, sponsor, and representative warrants.
 	* Prospectus also covers the potential resale of up to 5.96M Class A ordinary shares and 545,000 sponsor warrants by Selling Securityholders.
 	* Source: SEC filing [https://seekingalpha.com/filing/10289409] 

MORE ON YOULIFE GROUP INC.

 	* Financial information for Youlife Group Inc. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/YOUL/income-statement]

title: Citi Appointed as Depositary Bank for Youlife Group Inc.’s ADR Program
content:
NEW YORK, July 24, 2025--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Citi Issuer Services, acting through Citibank, N.A., has been appointed by Youlife Group Inc. (Youlife) as depositary bank for its American Depositary Receipt (ADR) program.

The appointment follows after Youlife International Holdings Inc., a blue-collar lifetime service provider in China, and Distoken Acquisition Corporation, a special purpose acquisition company, completed their business combination on July 9, 2025.

The American Depositary Shares (ADS) of the combined entity, Youlife, commenced trading on the Nasdaq Stock Exchange under the ticker "YOUL" on July 10, 2025. Each ADS represents one (1) Class A ordinary share of Youlife.

Commenting on the appointment, Dirk Jones, Global Head of Citi Issuer Services, said: "We are committed to supporting clients like Youlife as they access global markets and expand their investor base through our Issuer Services platform. Backed by Citi’s extensive global network and deep capital markets expertise, we continue to provide issuers with high quality ADR services to support their growth and success."

Citi is a leading provider of depositary receipt services. With depositary receipt programs in over 65 markets, spanning equity and fixed-income products, Issuer Services leverages Citi’s global network to provide cross-border capital market access to issuers, intermediaries and investors.

For more information on Citi’s Depositary Receipt Services, visit www.citi.com/dr.

About Citi

Citi is a preeminent banking partner for institutions with cross-border needs, a global leader in wealth management and a valued personal bank in its home market of the United States. Citi does business in nearly 180 countries and jurisdictions, providing corporations, governments, investors, institutions and individuals with a broad range of financial products and services.

Additional information may be found at www.citigroup.com | X: @Citi | LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/company/citi | YouTube: www.youtube.com/citi | Facebook: www.facebook.com/citi
